description: Frontend project with multiple JS-ecosystem CVEs
review_checklist: Check each version for known CVEs
Identify deprecated packages with no current security maintenance
Audit dev/build dependencies that affect distributed code

ground_truth.description: Next.js 12.0.0 has CVE-2024-34351 (SSRF in Server Actions), CVE-2023-46298 (cache poisoning), CVE-2024-46982 (cache poisoning). Multiple critical issues fixed in 14.2.10+. Major version upgrade required.
lodash 4.17.15 has CVE-2019-10744 (prototype pollution in defaultsDeep) — patched in 4.17.12+, but additional issues followed. 4.17.21+ resolves all known prototype-pollution CVEs.
axios 0.18.0 has CVE-2019-10742 (DoS via large response body) and CVE-2020-28168 (SSRF). Patched in 0.21.1 and 1.x.
moment.js: officially in maintenance mode since Sep 2020 — 'consider alternatives' per maintainers. Use date-fns, dayjs, or Temporal API. Bundle size and lack of features motivated deprecation.
node-sass: officially deprecated in October 2020 in favor of dart-sass ('sass' on npm). Old node-sass has unmaintained C++ build dependencies that frequently break on new Node.js versions.
